body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
I had saved the rosetta soil parameters in the wrong order in depth. Two PRs in ClimaArtifacts fixed this issue:
PR https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaArtifacts/pull/173 fixed the bug and remakes the parameter file
PR https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaArtifacts/pull/167 recreates the IC based on these parameters

This PR then just makes it so we use those parameters now

title: use fixed artifacts related to rosetta parameters
